title: Disa × vogelpoelii
taxonomy: Disa × vogelpoelii is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from a cross between the Disa draconis and Disa recurva species. It is classified within the family Orchidaceae and is native to South Africa. As a hybrid, its classification can be complex, and it is not always easily distinguished from its parent species. Disa × vogelpoelii is often found in grasslands and rocky outcrops, where its parent species also thrive. The exact classification of Disa × vogelpoelii can vary depending on the source and the specific characteristics used for identification.
